name: fal-audio
description: Text-to-speech and speech-to-text using fal.ai audio models
capabilities: Generate speech from text using fal.ai TTS models
Transcribe speech to text using fal.ai STT models
Provide guidance on audio model selection
Offer patterns for integrating fal.ai audio services
author: sickn33
securitySummary: This is a documentation-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis flagged URLs and cryptographic patterns, but evaluation confirms these are false positives. The URLs are markdown hyperlinks in documentation, and the 'cryptographic algorithm' detection was triggered by the word 'text' in the description.
valueStatement: This skill enables Claude to work with text-to-speech and speech-to-text capabilities using fal.ai audio models, providing patterns and guidance for audio generation and transcription tasks.
userTitle: Convert Text to Speech with Fal.ai
limitations: Requires fal.ai API key for actual service calls
This is a guidance skill - no direct API integration code
Audio processing happens on fal.ai infrastructure

useCases.title: Voiceover Generation
useCases.description: Generate voiceover audio for videos, podcasts, or accessibility content

useCases.title: Audio Transcription
useCases.description: Convert spoken audio to text for transcription, subtitles, or analysis

useCases.title: Accessibility Features
useCases.description: Add text-to-speech capabilities to applications for accessibility

promptTemplates.title: Basic TTS Request
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the fal-audio skill to generate speech from the following text: [YOUR TEXT HERE]

promptTemplates.title: Speech Transcription
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the fal-audio skill to transcribe this audio file to text: [AUDIO FILE OR URL]

promptTemplates.title: Voice Style Selection
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the fal-audio skill to recommend appropriate voice settings for a [TYPE OF CONTENT] project
promptTemplates.scenario: Getting guidance on voice model selection

promptTemplates.title: Batch Audio Processing
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the fal-audio skill to create a process for converting multiple text segments to audio files

bestPractices: Provide clear, well-structured text for better speech synthesis results
Specify the target use case to help select appropriate voice models
Test with short text samples before processing longer content
antiPatterns: Do not assume the skill makes actual API calls - it provides guidance only
Do not expect audio processing to happen locally
Do not skip API key configuration for fal.ai services

faq.question: Does this skill make actual API calls to fal.ai?
faq.answer: No. This is a guidance skill that provides patterns and recommendations for working with fal.ai audio models.

faq.question: Do I need an API key?
faq.answer: Yes. You will need a fal.ai API key to make actual text-to-speech or speech-to-text requests.

faq.question: What languages are supported?
faq.answer: fal.ai audio models support multiple languages. The specific capabilities depend on the model version.

faq.question: Can this skill process audio files?
faq.answer: The skill provides guidance for speech-to-text transcription but actual processing happens via fal.ai API.

faq.question: Is the audio generated locally?
faq.answer: No. Audio generation and transcription are performed by fal.ai's cloud infrastructure.

faq.question: How do I integrate this with my application?
faq.answer: Use the patterns from this skill to call the fal.ai API with appropriate parameters for your use case.
